message:
refactor(tests): improve variable naming in anthropic multi-tool SSE builder

Rename shadowing variables in anthropic_multi_tool_sse() for clarity:
tools→tool_defs, tool0→first_tool, tool1→second_tool. Add
clippy::too_many_lines allow attribute to the function signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
